configurations.name: Hive (server.py)
configurations.command:
echo "
plant-2-plant hive starting...
  Studio:  http://localhost:4450/studio.html
  Concept: http://localhost:4450/index.html
" && python3 server.py

configurations.name: Open Studio in Chrome (hive must be running)
Open Concept in Chrome (hive must be running)
Static-only server (no LLM, no plant API)
configurations.command: echo "\nStatic only on http://localhost:4450 (concept + literature only)\n" && python3 -m http.server 4450
